$comment: Machine-readable variant catalog. Consumed via slidev-theme-tahta/variants.json. Set with themeConfig.variant.

variants.label: Editorial
variants.description: Refined serif headlines (Fraunces), hairline rules, faint grain. The default.

variants.label: Brutalist
variants.description: Monospace (Space Mono), hard edges, blueprint grid, lime accent.

variants.label: Soft
variants.description: Humanist sans (Plus Jakarta), big radius, soft shadows, coral accent.

variants.label: Minimal
variants.description: Swiss — Archivo heavy, maximum whitespace, hairline rules, red accent.

variants.label: Paper
variants.description: Warm editorial — rust serif on cream paper, faint grain.

variants.label: Atelier
variants.description: Cool refined dark with gradient display titles, periwinkle accent.

variants.label: Notebook
variants.description: White ruled paper, navy bold sans, dashed section rules, highlighter callouts.
